summary: Lead accepts M6-START-TO-VICTORY-SIM-LOOP-001 after systems_architect R2 ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The task now has a deterministic M6 Alpha start-to-victory loop through authoritative sim-core state, scheduler/GameCommand, query, save/load, replay, and Node/Worker-compatible hash paths; R2 fixed the polity-scoped postwar/governance evidence bug and added an unrelated-polity regression. Task is ACCEPTED pending PR, CI, merge to main, sync, and CLOSED checkpoint.

tests_run.result: Passed format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check.
Passed 1 file / 5 tests covering victory, defeat, continued-play, save/load mid-run, malformed command rejection, Node/Worker parity, and unrelated-polity postwar regression.
Passed; M6 Alpha Node hash 260f46c3 matched Worker-compatible hash 260f46c3, loaded hash 260f46c3, terminal outcome victory.
Passed architecture:check, sim:determinism, root vitest 39 files / 297 tests, and apps/web vitest 1 file / 4 tests.
Systems R2 ACCEPT handoff is valid.

decisions: Accept systems_architect R2 ACCEPT as sufficient architecture review for this task.
Keep M6 Alpha terminal recording on the same sim.evaluate-m6-alpha-outcome GameCommand path; no UI or AI-only mutation path is introduced.
Proceed to PR/CI integration before marking the task CLOSED.
risks: R4 scope touched sim-core/protocol/save-format/runner surfaces, so PR CI must pass before closing the task.
The unrelated-polity regression uses a test-only WorldState variant; accepted because terminal recording still uses the authoritative command, save/load, query, hash, and invariant paths.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge on pass, sync main, write CLOSED checkpoint, and continue to the next READY M6 task.
